description_long: This house features a modern, two-story design with a combination of gable and flat roof sections. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with stone accents at the base, and large windows provide ample natural light. A spacious upper-level terrace with a metal railing wraps around one side, offering an outdoor living area above a covered porch. The main entryway is sheltered beneath the terrace, with multiple doors and windows visible on the ground floor. The structure is rectangular with clean lines and a mix of traditional and contemporary architectural elements. The house appears well-suited for a suburban or urban neighborhood, with practical outdoor spaces and a robust, durable build.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable and flat roof, stone accents, large windows, and a spacious upper terrace with metal railings.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entry, covered porch, upper terrace with railing, and stone base accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and doors, and the full length of the upper terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with large windows and the upper story's gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roofline, stone base, and the terrace's wraparound design.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry beneath upper terrace, covered porch, multiple doors, and stone accent base
